title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
content:
Two-Factor Authentication adds an extra layer of security to your account.

**Enabling 2FA:**
1. Settings → Security → Two-Factor Authentication → Enable.
2. Scan the QR code with an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password).
3. Enter the 6-digit code to confirm setup.
4. Save your backup codes in a secure location — these are one-time-use codes if you lose your device.

**Logging In with 2FA:**
After entering your password, you'll be prompted for your 6-digit TOTP code.

**Disabling 2FA:**
Settings → Security → 2FA → Disable. You'll need to enter your password and a valid TOTP code to confirm.

**Lost Your Device?**
Use a backup code. If you've lost all backup codes, contact support@clouddesk.io with identity verification.
